title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as luffy enters the waiting room, meets dangerous competitors, and the tournament begins to reveal how many powers are converging on Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: We're about to close general registration!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Looks like no one else is coming, yeah!? Too scared to commit, huh!! Ahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy. Looks like you've got to go in over there

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Everyone watch out, because I'm entering this thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Will he be okay? Does he even know who today's participants are??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I think this might be some kind of battle show...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fight to your heart's content, but don't give away your identity!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Okay ... May I have your name?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: This is the waiting room for fighters.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll be taking that Mera Mera no mi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please relax until you're called to fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's gonna be me, you fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They've got all sorts of weapons, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He was the last guy to enter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What does that twerp think he's doing here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This sort of mockery... is the type I hate the most ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, brat with the fake beard!!! This is an arena, ain't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Where's the fun in crushing weaklings!? The crowd's here to see true fighters clash!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's no place for you!! Go home!!

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
